description: Letter in Hebrew, in a Byzantine hand, reporting on a highly secretive transaction involving gold dust. According to Avraham David, this is a 16th century letter possibly from Crete. However, there are many earlier Geniza letters (11th–13th century) with similar handwriting and formulae, and it's unclear if there's any evidence supporting a later dating. (Information in part from A. David via FGP.)
description_he: מכתב בעברית, בכתב יד ביזנטי, מדווח על עסקה סודית ביותר הכוללת אבק זהב. לפי אברהם דוד: המאה ה-16, ייתכן מכרתים.
